type.name: type_core_log
type.property: +section title="Borehole Log: {{name}}" {{group}} {{display_profile showMenu=true yAxisReverse=true marginTop=25 profileMode=markers profileMode="lines" indexField=".*depth.*" fields="#2,#3"}}
type.wiki:
+section title="Borehole Log File: {{name}}" :navtop +row +col-8 {{group}} {{description wikify=true}} :heading Chart {{core_profiles showMenu=true yAxisReverse=true marginTop=25 profileMode=markers profileMode="lines" indexField=".*depth.*" #fields="#2,#3"}} :heading Table {{display_download}} {{display_table}} :vspace 1em ---- :vspace 1em :heading Information {{information details="true" showTitle="false" }} -col +col-4 {{field name="top_depth" row.label="Top Depth:"}} {{field name="bottom_depth" row.label="Bottom Depth:"}}
:vspace 1em {{properties message="" metadata.types="!content.alias,!content.attachment,!content.thumbnail,!content.license" headingClass="formgroupheader" layout="linear" includeTitle="true" separator="" decorate="false" inherited="false" }} +center {{mapentry hideIfNoLocations=true width="90%" height="200px"}} -center -col -row -section
